attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.CATEGORY_SET_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.STRUCTURE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.VALIDATE_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.CONTROL_LEVEL, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.DEFAULT_CATEGORY_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.MULT_ITEM_CAT_ASSIGN_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.CONTROL_LEVEL_UPDATEABLE_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.MULT_ITEM_CAT_UPDATEABLE_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.HIERARCHY_ENABLED, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.VALIDATE_FLAG_UPDATEABLE_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.USER_CREATION_ALLOWED_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.RAISE_ITEM_CAT_ASSIGN_EVENT, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.RAISE_ALT_CAT_HIER_CHG_EVENT, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.RAISE_CATALOG_CAT_CHG_EVENT, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B,
 (
 select CATEGORY_SET_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B
 minus
 select CATEGORY_SET_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CATEGORY_SET_ID = STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.CATEGORY_SET_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS_B.REFRESH_DATETIME
